summary: Testing of interactive egg status feature and email settings completed. All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test pair with incubating clutch (3 eggs) for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API for egg status update (PUT /api/clutches/{clutch_id}/eggs/{egg_id}) is working. Email settings and test-email endpoints work correctly with proper error handling when SMTP credentials missing.

egg_status_feature.notes: Egg status can be changed during 'incubating' or 'hatching' clutch states. Completed clutches disable egg clicks by design.

settings_page.notes: All email configuration fields present with proper data-testids. Gmail App Password instructions displayed.

email_settings_api.notes: Settings save correctly and persist in MongoDB

error_handling.no_smtp_credentials: Returns 400 with 'SMTP credentials not configured. Please enter your Gmail and App Password in settings.'
error_handling.invalid_credentials: Returns 500 with 'Failed to send test email. Please check your Gmail App Password.'

observations.egg_click_interaction: Eggs in incubating/hatching clutches show popover with Fertile (green), Infertile (red), and Dead/Remove options. Clicking an option updates the egg status via API and refreshes the display.
observations.visual_feedback: Fertile eggs show as green circles, infertile as red. The legend 'Click eggs to change status' appears only for incubating/hatching clutches.
observations.email_ui: Settings page has clear Gmail App Password instructions with 4-step guide.
